name: bettercodex
description: BetterCodex client, in-app plugins/themes UI, hosted web, and hosted API.

scripts.web:dry-run: npm run web:build && npm exec --yes --package=wrangler -- wrangler deploy --dry-run --outdir /tmp/bettercodex-web-dry-run
scripts.web:deploy: npm run web:build && npm exec --yes --package=wrangler -- wrangler deploy
